summary: Tested backend leaderboard endpoints (9 pytest tests, all passing) and frontend rendering (3D hero, game cards, leaderboard, navigation, TikTok CTAs). All functionality working as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: review_request mentions nav data-testids like 'nav-link-featured' but actual implementation uses 'nav-nfg-crash', 'nav-arsenal', 'nav-leaderboard', 'nav-live'. Functionally correct (all anchor to #featured, #games, #leaderboard, #live) but documentation mismatch.
server.py line 161 uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') — should migrate to FastAPI lifespan handlers, non-blocking.
seed_data_creation: Backend /api/leaderboard/seed already populated with 12 nfg_crash entries (idempotent).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py cover root, leaderboard GET (sort/limit), seed idempotency, POST score persistence (with GET verification + cleanup), validation (negative score, empty player name -> 422), DELETE (404 for invalid, success + 404 on re-delete). Frontend confirmed: 3D canvas renders cosmic planet hero, no runtime errors, all 4 game cards (nfg_crash, nfg_wordwich, nfg_hangman, nfg_wordwheel) present, leaderboard has 12 rows, refresh button works, all 4 TikTok CTAs point to https://www.tiktok.com/@y666.suf, nav anchors target correct section IDs.
